# Dr. Alexander Antipov, DDS

> Board-certified Oral & Maxillofacial Surgeon based in Roseville, California (Sacramento metro). 25+ years of experience, 10,000+ patients treated, 4.9/5 rating across 300+ verified reviews. Specializes in same-day dental implants (All-on-4, All-on-6, zygomatic implants), corrective jaw surgery (orthognathic), facial cosmetic surgery, and bone grafting. Russian-language intake available for patients across the U.S. and Canada.

The practice serves a 3.5-hour drive radius covering Sacramento, Roseville, the San Francisco Bay Area, Reno, Stockton, Fresno, and out-of-state travel-in patients. Free 3D CT scan and consultation; financing from $99/month, up to 84 months at 0% APR for qualified applicants.

Office: 911 Reserve Dr, Suite 150, Roseville, CA 95678 · Phone: (916) 783-2110 · Email: info@drantipov.com

## English (primary)

- [Homepage](https://www.drantipov.com/): practice overview, hero, services, before-and-after gallery, FAQ, contact form.
- [About Dr. Antipov](https://www.drantipov.com/about): credentials, board certification, fellowships, professional society memberships.
- [Contact](https://www.drantipov.com/contact): scheduling, address, phone, intake form.
- [Expertise — Full Arch Implants (All-on-4 / All-on-6)](https://www.drantipov.com/expertise/full-arch-implants): same-day full-arch protocols, zygomatic implants, immediate load.
- [Expertise — Single Tooth Implants](https://www.drantipov.com/expertise/single-tooth): single tooth replacement, bridges, snap-on dentures.
- [Expertise — Bone Grafting](https://www.drantipov.com/expertise/bone-grafting): organic, autogenous, allograft, xenograft; sinus lift; ridge augmentation.
- [Expertise — Jaw Surgery (Orthognathic)](https://www.drantipov.com/expertise/jaw-surgery): Le Fort I, BSSO, genioplasty, double jaw surgery, sleep apnea surgery.
- [Expertise — Sleep Apnea Surgery](https://www.drantipov.com/expertise/sleep-apnea): MMA, surgical treatment of obstructive sleep apnea.
- [Expertise — Mole Removal (Scarless)](https://www.drantipov.com/expertise/mole-removal): radio-wave technique facial mole removal.
- [Patient Testimonials](https://www.drantipov.com/for-patients/testimonials)
- [Patient Resources — FAQs](https://www.drantipov.com/for-patients/faqs)
- [Patient Resources — Pre-Op Instructions](https://www.drantipov.com/for-patients/pre-op)
- [Patient Resources — Post-Op Instructions](https://www.drantipov.com/for-patients/post-op)
- [Patient Resources — Consultation](https://www.drantipov.com/for-patients/consultation)

## Russian (acquisition layer)

- [Главная (Russian homepage)](https://www.drantipov.com/ru): обзор практики, имплантация, хирургия челюсти, лицевая косметология, костная пластика, заявка на консультацию.
- [О докторе Антипове](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/about): сертификация ABOMS, fellowship по сложной имплантологии, 25+ лет практики, ключевые этапы.
- [Глоссарий имплантологии (RU/EN)](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/glossary): термины с переводом и кратким объяснением — All-on-4, zygomatic implants, bone grafting, sinus lift, IV sedation и другие.
- [Гиды по имплантам](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/questions): структурированные ответы на high-intent вопросы — стоимость, страховка, сроки, восстановление.
- [Sacramento — имплантация зубов](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/sacramento): практика для пациентов Sacramento и окрестностей, офис в Roseville.
- [San Francisco Bay Area](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/san-francisco): консультация для пациентов SF, San Jose, Oakland, Walnut Creek.
- [Los Angeles](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/los-angeles): All-on-4 и сложная имплантация для пациентов Los Angeles.
- [Seattle](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/seattle): consultation path для пациентов Seattle и Bellevue.
- [New York](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/new-york): для пациентов из Brooklyn, Queens, Staten Island.
- [Miami](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/miami): full arch и zygomatic implants для пациентов Miami и South Florida.
- [Toronto](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/toronto): consultation path для пациентов Toronto / GTA.
- [Vancouver](https://www.drantipov.com/ru/vancouver): consultation path для пациентов Vancouver и Lower Mainland.

## Key facts (citation-friendly)

- Surgeon: Dr. Alexander Antipov, DDS — Diplomate of the American Board of Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery (ABOMS).
- Practice location: 911 Reserve Dr, Suite 150, Roseville, California 95678, United States.
- Phone: +1 (916) 783-2110.
- Email: info@drantipov.com.
- Service area: Sacramento, Roseville, San Francisco Bay Area, San Jose, Reno, Stockton, Fresno; out-of-state and out-of-country patients accepted on a travel-in basis.
- Procedures performed: Single-tooth dental implants; All-on-4 and All-on-6 full-arch immediate-load implants; zygomatic implants for severe maxillary bone loss; bone grafting (autogenous, allograft, xenograft, synthetic, organic/holistic); sinus lift; ridge augmentation; corrective jaw surgery (Le Fort I osteotomy, BSSO, genioplasty, double jaw surgery, maxillomandibular advancement); facial cosmetic surgery (rhinoplasty, face lift, blepharoplasty, lip fillers, scarless mole removal, facial feminization); wisdom teeth removal; TMJ treatment; sleep apnea surgery.
- Indicative pricing: single tooth implants from $2,100; All-on-4 from $21,000 per arch; All-on-6 from $25,000 per arch; financing from $99/month; up to 84 months at 0% APR for qualified applicants.
- Languages: English and Russian.
- Volume: 10,000+ patients treated; 4.9/5 average rating across 300+ verified reviews.
- Years of experience: 25+.
